creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-10-19 14:45:18 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics             Makefile 
  Added files:
    graphics/c-a-i-r     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    graphics/c-a-i-r/files amd64-CAIR.cpp 
  Log:
  CAIR is an image resizing library that is based on the works of Shai Avidan and
  Ariel Shamir.  It is a high-performance multi-threaded library written in C++.
  It is intended to be multi-platform and multi-architecture.
  
  WWW: http://sourceforge.net/projects/c-a-i-r/
  
  PR:             ports/128183
  Submitted by:   buganini at gmail.com
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1190    +1 -0      ports/graphics/Makefile
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/graphics/c-a-i-r/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/graphics/c-a-i-r/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +56 -0     ports/graphics/c-a-i-r/files/amd64-CAIR.cpp (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/graphics/c-a-i-r/pkg-descr (new)
